messages.content: Welcome to TestBiz! What brings you here today?
I mentioned earlier I need help with my marketing campaign
Yes, you mentioned a marketing campaign with a $5000 budget targeting local customers.
Exactly. So what are the next steps?

content.text: Since you're looking at a local marketing campaign with a $5000 budget, here's what I recommend as next steps: Let's schedule a strategy call where we can map out the specifics. You can book a time that works for you at https://calendly.com/testbiz.
